meta.title: Improving Patient Safety
meta.sourceDoc: 148. P3 - Improving Patient Safety 药品包装设计.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Improving Patient Safety 药品包装设计

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：C
PDF 定位：老年人会受益于不需要用力打开的药品容器。
PDF 解析：第45段:"Many child-resistant packs are based 说话人是RichardMawle(选C)。题干中的do not requireforce（不需要用力）原文反对"靠力量"， on strength but older people may have the same 主张改为"认知步骤"。因此老人从"非力气式开启" level of strength as a child, ..better designs could rely on cognitive skills (e.g. removing the lid using 中获益。 athree-stepprocess)."/"许多儿童防启瓶依赖力量， 但老年人的力量可能与儿童相当；更好的设计应依赖认 知步骤(如三步法开盖)。"

题目 28
答案：D
PDF 定位：为盲人改造包装可能会不利于有视力的人。
PDF 解析：第7段："it is notknown howmuch visually 这一观点来自KarelvanderWaarde（选D)。题 干maydisadvantagepeoplewhocan see原文 impaired patients will benefit nor how much the reading of visually able patients will be impaired." / reading ... will be impaired。 "尚不清楚视障者能获益多少，也不清楚有视力者的阅读 会被妨碍多少。"

题目 29
答案：B
PDF 定位：特制容器并未消除误吞药物的情况。
PDF 解析：第4段："70%of children admitted...have 来自 Child Accident Prevention Trust(选B)。题干 swallowed medicines, and although child-resistant "末能消除"原文"notyetfullyeffective"。 lids have helped, they are not yet fully effective." / "尽管儿童防启盖有帮助，但尚未完全有效。"

题目 30
答案：A
PDF 定位：设计师必须考虑家庭中药物的使用场景。
PDF 解析：第3段："real situations in which medicines are 观点来自Thea Swayne（选A)。题干used inthe home 与原文 real situations...middle of the night used include a parent giving a cough medicine to a child in the middle of the night; packaging should （典型家庭场景）同义指向。 be designed for moments such as these rather thanfortheidealworldofahospital."/"真实情境包 括半夜父母给孩子喂药；包装应为此类情境而非理想化 的医院而设计。"

题目 31
答案：D
PDF 定位：主管机构需要比较不同药品容器，而不是只研究单 个容器。
PDF 解析：第7段："They do not look at the use of packaging 说话人KarelvanderWaarde（选D)。题干"比较不 in a practical context they only see one box at a "Governing bodies"="regulatory authorities"。 time and not several together as pharmacists woulddo."/"监管方一次只看一个盒子，而不是像药剂 师那样把多个一起比较。"

题目 32
答案：C
PDF 定位：药品附带信息（PIL）中先后顺序不合理。
PDF 解析：第5段："There can be an awful lot of junk at the 观点来自Richard Mawle(选C)。题干"not listed in therightorder"原文批评"把次要信息放前、重要 beginning of PILs... why are company details towards the beginning... when what might be more 警示靠后"。 vital... is that the medicine should not be taken with alcohol？"/"说明书开头常塞满无用信息；为何把公司 信息放在前面，而不是把与酒同服禁忌这类要点置前？"

questionSections.text:
题目 33
答案：marketing team
PDF 定位："First, a proposal is written by the _." → marketing team 营销团队
PDF 解析：第2段:"The marketing team prepares the initial brief..." "proposal/brief"对应"营销团队先写初 始方案"。

题目 34
答案：external design team
PDF 定位：*Then several designs are produced by the. externaldesignteam外部设计团队
PDF 解析：第2段:..so these are usually commissioned from an OTC外包给外部团队产出多版设计。 external design team. The ... designers come up with six or seven designs."

题目 35
答案：consumers
PDF 定位："Finally, selected designs are shown to, consumers消费者
PDF 解析：第2段: "Two or three of these are then tested on a 选定方案给消费者小组测试。 consumer group.

题目 36
答案：in-house design team
PDF 定位："The. create the design." → in-house design team 内部设计团队
PDF 解析：第2段:"In contrast, most designs for prescription-only 处方药多数由公司内部团队完成设计。 products are created in-house."

题目 37
答案：design engineers
PDF 定位：*The design is then passed to. ." → design engineers 设计工程师
PDF 解析：第2段:"...then handing it over to design engineers 内部设计完成后转交工程师（而非做消费 者测试)。 rather than testing...

questionSections.text:
题目 38
答案：B
PDF 定位：文中那起给错药的事故中，导致错误的"设计考量"
PDF 解析：第3段："Investigations... attributed some blame Bthe style of print（字样/字体）与 choice of

题目 39
答案：C
PDF 定位：关于只用黑白作为设计特征，有人怎么说？
PDF 解析：第7段："if all packagingwas whitewithblack 这正对应C"人们会更注意标签信息"。A/B/D原文末支

题目 40
答案：A
PDF 定位：作者为什么提到"the popper"和"Pluspoint"?
PDF 解析：第8段："On a positive note, a recent innovation 作者用它们举例说明进展，故选A。B是"问题样例"， 不符；C"证明还有很多工作要做"并非这两例的直接功 exhibition revealed several new designs. 'The popper' aims to help... and 'Pluspoint'.. The aim of 能；D"强调患者需了解更多"亦非文意。 gooddesign isto...safer."」"值得肯定的是，创新展 上出现了新设计.目的在于更友好也更安全。
